action.description:
Introduced by Senators Smith, L. Johnson, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Hesselbein, Larson, Ratcliff, Roys and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Stroud, Joers, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Bare, Billings, Brown, Clancy, DeSanto, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Hong, J. Jacobson, Johnson, Kirsch, Madison, Mayadev, McCarville, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Phelps, Rivera-Wagner, Roe, Sheehan, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Spaude, Stubbs, Subeck, Taylor, Tenorio, Udell and Vining
